message:
fix: seven code-review bugs across install.sh, runtime.rs, query_expansion.rs

- install.sh: Add missing right border (│) on Binary/Version lines in
  the ANSI completion box by dynamically padding to box width
- runtime.rs: Replace dead-code `.max(limit)` with `.max(20)` to ensure
  at least 20 candidates for reciprocal rank fusion even with tiny limits
- runtime.rs: Wrap pdf_extract::extract_text_from_mem in catch_unwind to
  gracefully handle panics from malformed PDFs instead of aborting
- query_expansion.rs: Fix invalid Anthropic model ID from
  "claude-haiku-4-20250514" to "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001"
- runtime.rs: Document that the blocking ureq call in execute_expanded_search
  is intentional given the cooperative asupersync runtime
- runtime.rs: Flatten two `else { if ... }` blocks into idiomatic `else if`
  in the PDF/binary canonicalization branches
- runtime.rs: Warn when both --expand and --daemon are set, since --expand
  silently takes precedence

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
